message:
Fix renderText: handle newlines properly + 3x scaling

- Split text by \n and render as multiple lines vertically
- Switch to 4×6 font (more readable than 3×4)
- Add 3x pixel scaling for readability
- Fixes: images were 4000px wide × 4px tall (unreadable)
- Now: proper multi-line images with readable text
- Example: 10 lines × 100 chars = 1500×180px (reasonable)
